titleStmt.title: SII 27.166: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 166. (A.R. No. 501 of 1928-29.) PUTTIGE, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the courtyard of the Puttige-maṭha.
This record is dated Śaka 1440 (expired) and 1441 (current), Bahudhānya, Māgha ba. 18, Friday corresponding to 1519 A.D., January 28.

It registers a gift of a portion income from the siddhāya tax that was due to Raghunātha-voḍeya from Putteya in Odayaṅgala-nāḍu for offering and maintenance of a perpetual lamp in the Kṛishṇa temple to Raghunātha-voḍeya by Vijayappa-voḍeya, son of Ratnappa-oḍeya who was governing from Bārahakanyā-pura and also Raghunatha-oḍeya, at the instance of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁ
bi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbha
vē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhanaśakavarusa 1440 saṁdu voṁda
neya bahudhānya saṁvatsarada māgha bahuḷa 12 śulu śrīma
nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīrakṛṣṇarāya
mahārāyaru vijeyanagariya siṁhāsanadalu cittayisi duṣṭani
graha śiṣṭaparipālakanāgi sakalavaṁrnnadharṁmmāśriyaṁgaḷanu pāli
suvali Ā rāyara nirūpadiṁda bārahakaṁnyāpuravanu ratnappoḍeyara kumā .
ra vijeyappa voḍeyaru rājyavanāḷuvalli Ā kruṣṇarāyara nirūpa
diṁda vijeyappa voḍeyaru raghunātha voḍeyarū pūjeyamāḍuva
śrī kruṣṇadēvara Amrutapaḍi naṁdādīptige kuḷavakaḍidu dhāṟeyaneṟadu
barasikoṭa dharṁmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare naṁma Arumaneya bhaṁḍā
rastaḷada Udayaṁgalanāḍavoḷaṇa putteyada Ūroḷage Aramanege te
ttubaha sidhāya hoṁnina voḷage raghunātha voḍeyara pālige baṁ
da salilava Aṁbaḷedavana Appaṇeyalū baṁdagade mūḍe 140 Ā
ka ga 52 kaṁ dyāṇa ga 2392 Akṣaradalu vara
ha mūṟa veraḍanūṟeraḍu haṇavanū Uṁbaḷiyā
gi kuḷavakaḍidu dhāṟeyaneṟadu koṭeU kṛśnadēvara Omratapaḍi
naṁdādīptiyanu naḍapi niṁma śaṣya pāraṁpareyāgi Ācaṁdrā
rkasthāyiyāgi nīvē Anubhavisi bahiri yeṁdu vijeyappavoḍeru
raghunātha voḍeyaru sahiraṇyōdaka dāna dhārāpūrvakavāgi sarvvamānyavāgi
dhāreyaneṟadu barasikoṭa dharṁmma śilāśāsana yiṁ tapidake Ū
1 nagaṇapau nāṇayna vopi bārakūra raṇakavayarasara baraha
vopa śrīvi
Digital edition of SII 27.166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
